The changelog is automatically generated and it follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/en/v1.0.0/) format.

## [camunda-platform-8.8-13.12.2](https://github.com/camunda/camunda-platform-helm/releases/tag/camunda-platform-8.8-13.12.2) (2026-07-08)

### Fixes

- Fail clearly when an image override has an empty tag and no digest (#6462)
- Surface deprecation warnings on the gitops render path (#6530)

<!-- generated by git-cliff -->

### Verification

For quick verification of the Helm chart integrity using [Cosign](https://docs.sigstore.dev/signing/quickstart/):

```shell
cosign verify-blob camunda-platform-13.12.2.tgz \
  --bundle "camunda-platform-13.12.2-cosign-bundle.json" \
  --certificate-identity-regexp "https://github.com/camunda/camunda-platform-helm" \
  --certificate-oidc-issuer "https://token.actions.githubusercontent.com"
```

For detailed verification instructions, check the steps in the `camunda-platform-13.12.2-cosign-verify.sh` file.
